name: the-big-book-of-serial-killers
description: Jack Rosewood's encyclopedia of 150 serial killers — understanding criminal typologies, investigative patterns, victimology, and the psychology of serial murder.
useCase: Understanding serial killer typologies, learning investigative patterns, criminal psychology reference, forensic awareness.
knownRisks: Contains graphic descriptions of violent crimes — not suitable for all readers
The book is an encyclopedia, not a narrative; each profile is relatively brief
Some readers may find the subject matter disturbing or triggering
